description: Ranks sectors by momentum acceleration (21d momentum change over 10d). Holds top 3 equal-weight. Exposure scaled to target 15% vol. Monthly rotation. Same-day close execution.

how_it_works.acceleration_ranking: Rank sectors by CHANGE in 21-day momentum over last 10 days. Positive = strengthening trend.
how_it_works.when_invested: Equal-weight top 3 sectors by acceleration. Always invested (no binary gate).
how_it_works.vol_targeting: Scale total exposure to maintain 15% annualized portfolio vol. High vol → lower exposure, low vol → full exposure.
how_it_works.rebalance: Sector selection updated on 1st trading day of each month. Exposure adjusted daily.
how_it_works.execution: Same-day close via MOC orders. 5 bps slippage per trade.
